jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at 5paisa
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, 5paisa in Indore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About 5paisa:
5paisa is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 5paisa!
